scenes.summary: A kind couple living near a deep forest joyfully welcomes their baby girl, fulfilling their heartfelt wish. They cherish her innocence and promise safety, while a nearby mysterious garden with shining green rapunzel leaves hints at danger.
beats: Beat 1: The couple marvels at their newborn baby with bright eyes and a tiny laugh.
Beat 2: Mother cradles the baby as father vows to keep her safe forever.
Beat 3: View of the high stone wall enclosing the mysterious garden with rapunzel leaves.

scenes.summary: The story reveals the origin of the enchantress's claim on the baby: the father stole rapunzel leaves from Dame Gothel's garden to save his wife, angering the enchantress who demands the newborn as retribution. Years later, Dame Gothel comes to take the child.
beats: Beat 1: Father climbs the garden wall at night to steal rapunzel leaves for his sick wife.
Beat 2: Dame Gothel catches him and curses that their baby will belong to her.
Beat 3: The enchantress arrives years later to claim the young girl, renaming her Rapunzel.

scenes.summary: Dame Gothel raises Rapunzel in a hidden forest tower with no door, only a high window. Rapunzel grows, her golden hair long and bright. Gothel visits daily, climbing up by calling down Rapunzel's hair, giving lessons but denying freedom, fostering isolation and control.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel sits in the tower, braiding her extremely long golden hair at the window.
Beat 2: Gothel calls up to Rapunzel to let down her hair and climbs the rope to bring supplies.
Beat 3: Rapunzel questions why she can't leave; Gothel warns of the cruel world and insists she is the only protector.

scenes.summary: Rapunzel's singing enthralls forest animals, and one evening, Prince Adrian hears her angelic voice while riding through the forest. Intrigued, he searches and discovers the tower but no door, witnessing Gothel’s method of entry.
beats: Beat 1: Prince Adrian listens intently to Rapunzel’s singing as he rides through the forest.
Beat 2: He investigates the base of the tower and notes the absence of a door.
Beat 3: He observes Dame Gothel climbing up Rapunzel’s hanging hair and disappearing inside.

scenes.summary: Taking a bold step, the prince calls to Rapunzel by the tower and gains her trust during his secret visits. They bond, sharing stories and dreams, and Rapunzel longs for freedom. Adrian promises to help her escape using a silk rope ladder he will bring over time.
beats: Beat 1: At night, Adrian calls for Rapunzel, who lowers her hair so he can climb up.
Beat 2: They introduce themselves and share stories about the world beyond the tower.
Beat 3: They plan to weave a silk rope ladder together for her escape.

scenes.summary: Weeks pass as Adrian secretly brings silk thread for Rapunzel to weave into a rope ladder, deepening their connection. Their hope grows until Rapunzel accidentally reveals the prince’s name to Gothel during a hair brushing, triggering the enchantress’s wrath.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel weaves the silk ladder under her bed while talking and laughing with Adrian.
Beat 2: Gothel brushes Rapunzel’s hair, and Rapunzel mentions Prince Adrian’s name thoughtlessly.
Beat 3: Gothel reacts furiously upon hearing the name, seizes, and destroys the rope ladder.

scenes.summary: Gothel punishes Rapunzel by cutting her long golden hair short and banishing her to a distant, isolated cottage near a desert. Rapunzel resolves to remain brave despite her fear and separation from the prince and tower.
beats: Beat 1: Gothel cuts Rapunzel’s hair abruptly and shouts at her.
Beat 2: She carries Rapunzel away to a lonely cottage far from the forest.
Beat 3: Rapunzel touches her short hair and whispers her determination to stay brave.

scenes.summary: Prince Adrian arrives at the tower, calling for Rapunzel, but discovers Gothel waiting in disguise. He retreats but falls, injuring his eyes badly. Despite blindness, Adrian spends months searching tirelessly for Rapunzel, calling her name through forests and fields.
beats: Beat 1: Adrian climbs the ladder expecting Rapunzel but finds Gothel instead.
Beat 2: He falls from the tower window into thorn bushes and is injured.
Beat 3: Blind and persistent, Adrian searches the countryside, calling for Rapunzel.

scenes.summary: Rapunzel adapts to life in the cottage, learning to care for herself and befriending local shepherd children with stories and songs. One day she hears a distant call — it is the prince, weary but determined, who has found her. Their joyful reunion heals and restores hope.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel tends a small garden and plays with shepherd children.
Beat 2: She sings and tells stories as the children listen.
Beat 3: She hears Adrian calling her name, runs to him, and embraces him as his sight returns.

scenes.summary: After resting with the shepherd families, Rapunzel and Adrian prepare to journey toward the prince’s kingdom. They travel slowly and carefully through villages, enjoying kindness and nature while strengthening their bond and hope for true safety.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel and Adrian pack their belongings and prepare to leave the cottage.
Beat 2: They travel through villages, meeting farmers and staying in inns.
Beat 3: They cross green valleys together, savoring sunrises and freedom.

scenes.summary: Upon reaching the kingdom, Rapunzel is warmly welcomed by the king and queen alongside Adrian. She reflects on safety not as confinement but as love and freedom, sharing her wisdom with newfound community and embracing a joyful future.
beats: Beat 1: The king and queen greet Adrian and Rapunzel with open arms.
Beat 2: Rapunzel speaks about safety being love, truth, and growth.
Beat 3: Children listen as Rapunzel shares her story and message of kindness and bravery.

scenes.summary: Rapunzel and Adrian marry in a joyful celebration filled with music, flowers, and dancing children. Rapunzel sings freely beneath the open sky, symbolizing her liberation. They share a hopeful gaze, grateful for finding each other and their path to true freedom.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel and Adrian exchange vows in a festive outdoor ceremony.
Beat 2: The town square fills with music, flowers, and children dancing.
Beat 3: Rapunzel sings openly, smiling with Adrian, embodying freedom and love.

characters.name: Rapunzel
characters.description: A brave girl with long golden hair, raised captive in a tower by Dame Gothel.

characters.name: Prince Adrian
characters.description: Young prince who finds Rapunzel and helps her seek freedom and safety.

characters.name: Dame Gothel
characters.description: Powerful enchantress who raises Rapunzel in captivity and opposes her freedom.

characters.name: Rapunzel's Mother
characters.description: Kind woman who longed for a child and craved rapunzel leaves.

characters.name: Rapunzel's Father
characters.description: Man who stole rapunzel leaves for his wife and begged for his daughter's freedom.

characters.name: Shepherd Children
characters.description: Local children who befriend Rapunzel during her exile in the cottage.

characters.name: The King
characters.description: Adrian's father who warmly welcomes Rapunzel to the kingdom.

characters.name: The Queen
characters.description: Adrian's mother who embraces Rapunzel and offers safety in the kingdom.

characters.name: The Guard
characters.description: A guard who accompanies the prince and notes the singing from the forest.
